purpose: Authorize the story packet validator contract before executable implementation exists.

canonicalNodes.statement: The validator requires source narrative and story packet inputs.
The validator can report pass findings when the story packet is authorized and traceable.
The validator can report story mismatch findings when the story packet drifts from source narrative.
The validator can report source trace break findings when source narrative linkage is missing.

rules.statement: No executable story validator body may introduce behavior not named in story, canonical spec, schemas, and evidence expectations.
